onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_welcome_content: Your AI-powered command center for managing agents, chats, files, and more. Let's take a quick tour!
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_sidebar_content: Navigate between all your tools here. Collapse/expand sections to customize your workspace.
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_new_session_content: Click here to start a new AI chat session. Each conversation is saved automatically.
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_dashboard_content: Your overview of sessions, usage, and activity. See everything at a glance.
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_agent_hub_content: Manage your AI agents and configurations. Create custom agents with specialized behaviors.
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_skills_content: Browse and install agent skills to extend capabilities. Add new tools and abilities to your agents.
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_terminal_content: Built-in terminal for quick commands. Execute shell commands without leaving Petasos.
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_usage_content: Monitor your AI provider usage in real-time. Track costs and API consumption.
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_settings_content: Configure providers, themes, accent colors, and more. Make Petasos yours.
onboarding/tour-steps.tsx.tour_finish_content: Start chatting with your AI, explore the tools, and customize Petasos to fit your workflow. Need help? Press ? to see all keyboard shortcuts.

onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.provider_atomic_desc: Local LLMs via Atomic Chat desktop app
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.welcome_desc: Works with any OpenAI-compatible backend. Hermes gateway APIs unlock sessions, memory, skills, and other extras automatically.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.connect_desc: Start by verifying that Petasos can reach your OpenAI-compatible backend.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.backend_connected_enhanced: Backend connected. Core chat works, and Hermes gateway enhancements are available.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.backend_connected_basic: Backend connected. Core chat is ready.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.backend_partial: Backend is reachable, but /v1/chat/completions is not available yet.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.compatible_backends_desc: Use any backend that exposes /v1/chat/completions. If you point Hermes Workspace at a Hermes gateway, enhanced features unlock automatically.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.choose_provider_editable: Save provider settings here, then choose a model before testing chat.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.choose_provider_readonly: This backend manages provider settings outside Petasos. Confirm the model you expect to use, then test chat.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.oauth_after_login: After the login flow completes, click below to refresh provider settings.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.models_fetched: Models were fetched from the backend when available.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.models_manual: If your backend does not expose /v1/models, enter the model name manually.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.inapp_unavailable: In-app provider editing is unavailable on this backend. That is optional. If the backend is already configured, continue to the chat test.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.test_chat_desc: Verify that core chat works first. Enhanced Hermes features are optional and appear automatically when supported.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.check_credentials: Check your provider credentials and account access.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.confirm_model: Confirm the selected model exists on this backend.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.confirm_backend: Confirm the backend is running and still reachable from Petasos.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.workspace_ready_enhanced: This backend also exposes Hermes gateway enhancements.
onboarding/hermes-onboarding.tsx.workspace_ready_portable: If you later connect a Hermes gateway, enhanced features unlock automatically.

connection-startup-screen.tsx.welcome_desc: Petasos works with any OpenAI-compatible backend. Hermes gateway APIs unlock enhanced features automatically when they are available.
connection-startup-screen.tsx.auto_refresh_note: This page auto-refreshes when a compatible backend is detected
connection-startup-screen.tsx.setup_step1_note: Portable chat works with any backend that exposes /v1/chat/completions (Ollama, LiteLLM, vLLM, etc.)
connection-startup-screen.tsx.setup_step2_title: Optional: run a Hermes gateway locally
connection-startup-screen.tsx.setup_step2_note: Hermes gateway APIs unlock sessions, skills, memory, and other workspace extras automatically
connection-startup-screen.tsx.setup_step4_note: The gateway HTTP API is opt-in. Without this, the gateway serves messaging platforms but does not expose port 8642 for the workspace.
connection-startup-screen.tsx.setup_step5_note: Or use Auto-Start below if hermes-agent is already installed locally

settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.provider_desc: Select your AI provider. OAuth providers authenticate via browser.
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.theme_toggle_desc: Toggle the current theme family between paired light and dark variants.
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.chat_desc: Message visibility and response loader style.
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.show_tool_messages_desc: Display tool call details in assistant responses.
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.show_reasoning_blocks_desc: Display model reasoning blocks when available.
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.hermes_url_desc: Used for API requests from Studio
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.smart_routing_desc: Route simple queries to cheaper models.
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.max_words_desc: Messages with fewer words use cheap model
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.display_desc: Agent response style and output preferences.
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.language_desc: Choose the display language for the workspace UI.
settings-dialog/settings-dialog.tsx.system_metrics_desc: Show a persistent footer with CPU, RAM, disk, and Hermes status.

mobile-prompt/MobilePromptTrigger.tsx.setup_mobile_desc: Connect your phone to this Petasos instance in a few steps.

mobile-prompt/MobileSetupModal.tsx.step_install_tailscale_desktop_body: Install Tailscale on the machine running Petasos, then sign in.
mobile-prompt/MobileSetupModal.tsx.step_keep_reachable_body: Petasos can talk to any OpenAI-compatible backend on mobile too. Make sure both the workspace and backend stay reachable over Tailscale or your local network.
mobile-prompt/MobileSetupModal.tsx.step_keep_reachable_note: Enhanced Hermes gateway APIs are optional. If core chat already works on desktop, mobile access mainly depends on network reachability.
mobile-prompt/MobileSetupModal.tsx.step_install_tailscale_phone_body: Install Tailscale on iOS or Android and sign in with the same account.
mobile-prompt/MobileSetupModal.tsx.step_open_petasos_tailscale_body: Your Tailscale address. Open this on your phone browser to use the same workspace.
mobile-prompt/MobileSetupModal.tsx.step_open_petasos_lan_body: Your local network address. Your phone must be on the same WiFi.
mobile-prompt/MobileSetupModal.tsx.step_open_petasos_localhost_body: Start Tailscale on this machine if you want a shareable address outside localhost.

workspace-shell.tsx.error_boundary_desc: This page failed to render. Reload to try again.

backend-unavailable-state.tsx.not_available: Not available on this backend. Connect to a Hermes gateway to unlock

error-boundary.tsx.default_desc: The chat encountered an unexpected issue. Reload to try again.

error-toast.tsx.rate_limited: Rate limited — try again in a moment
error-toast.tsx.auth_error: Authentication error — check your API key in Settings
error-toast.tsx.model_error: Model error — the provider is having issues

slash-command-menu.tsx.slash_model_desc: Show or change the current model

usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.title: Usage Overview
usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.description: Live usage from your Hermes session and connected providers.
usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.no_model_usage: No model usage reported yet. Send a message to start tracking usage here.
usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.no_sessions: No sessions reported yet. Start a chat to see session history here.
usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.no_providers: No providers connected. Add a provider in Settings to start chatting.
usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.no_providers_hint: Open Settings -> Providers to connect Claude CLI or add an API key.
usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.provider_auth_expired: Re-authenticate your provider session or update your API key in Settings → Providers.
usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.provider_missing_credentials: Add your API key in Settings → Providers, or run the provider's CLI to authenticate.
usage-meter/usage-details-modal.tsx.provider_error: Check your network connection and try refreshing. If the issue persists, check the provider's status page.

usage-meter/context-alert-modal.tsx.context_percent: of your model's context window is in use
usage-meter/context-alert-modal.tsx.context_critical_desc: Your conversation history is nearly at the model's limit. Responses may become less accurate as the model loses access to earlier context. You should start a new chat soon.
usage-meter/context-alert-modal.tsx.context_danger_desc: Your conversation is getting long. The model may start forgetting earlier messages. Consider starting a new chat for best results.
usage-meter/context-alert-modal.tsx.context_warning_desc: Hermes will auto-compact your context soon (it triggers at ~40% usage). Older messages will be summarized. Consider writing a handoff or starting a new chat to preserve full context.
usage-meter/context-alert-modal.tsx.rec_new_chat: Start a new chat to reset context
usage-meter/context-alert-modal.tsx.rec_auto_compact: Enable auto-compaction in Settings → Config to automatically manage context
usage-meter/context-alert-modal.tsx.rec_summarize: Summarize important details before starting a new chat
usage-meter/context-alert-modal.tsx.rec_concise: Keep messages concise to use context efficiently

manage-modes-modal.tsx.title: Manage Modes
manage-modes-modal.tsx.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

save-mode-dialog.tsx.title: Save Mode
save-mode-dialog.tsx.include_model_desc: If unchecked, applying this mode will only update settings (not model).

apply-mode-dialog.tsx.title: Switch Model?
apply-mode-dialog.tsx.switch_desc: Mode "{name}" uses {model}. Would you like to switch to this model now?

agent-chat/AgentChatInput.tsx.enter_to_send: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line

agent-chat/AgentChatModal.tsx.demo_intro: Hermes is unavailable. Running in demo mode with simulated responses.
agent-chat/AgentChatModal.tsx.demo_reply: {agentName} (demo): Received "{text}". Hermes is unavailable, so this is a simulated response.
